item.title: FCC 更新涵盖列表以纳入外国制造的消费者路由器
item.description: https://docs.fcc.gov/public/attachments/DOC-420034A1.pdfhttps://www.fcc.gov/document/fcc-adds-routers- Produced-forei...https://docs.fcc.gov/public/attachments/DA-26-278A1.pdfhttps://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c74787w149zohttps://www.cnet.com/home/internet/fcc-bans-foreign-made-rou... <小时/> 评论网址：https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47495344 积分：285 评论数量：190
